title: Samsung Electronics Establishes RX Robotics Division to Accelerate Commercialization of Robotics Business
excerpt: On July 21, Samsung Electronics officially established the RX Business Unit (Robotics eXperience, Robotics Experience), which will report directly to the compan
content_html:
On July 21, Samsung Electronics officially established the RX Business Unit (Robotics eXperience, Robotics Experience), which will report directly to the company's Chief Executive Officer and be an important part of Samsung's future growth strategy.

According to the information, the RX Business Unit will be responsible for formulating the medium- and long-term development plan in the field of robotics, promoting core robot technology research and development and product business implementation, while strengthening R&D system construction in South Korea and overseas to enhance the commercialization capability of robot technology.

This organizational adjustment indicates that Samsung is further increasing its investment in the field of robotics, driving related businesses from the research and development stage to the stage of large-scale application. As a global leader in consumer electronics and smart hardware, Samsung aims to expand new growth space through robot technology and strengthen its competitiveness in artificial intelligence, smart home, and future service robots.

In recent years, with the rapid development of artificial intelligence, large models, and intelligent manufacturing technologies, the robotics industry has become a new direction of competition among tech companies. Companies including Samsung, NVIDIA, Google, and Tesla are accelerating their robot technology layout, promoting the deep integration of AI capabilities with physical devices.

The establishment of an independent robot business unit by Samsung shows that the company is adjusting its organizational structure to integrate R&D resources and accelerate the commercialization of robot products. In the future, whether the RX Business Unit can launch robot products with market competitiveness will be an important indicator to observe the implementation of Samsung's AI and smart hardware strategy.

content_html_zh:
7月21日，三星电子正式成立RX事业部（Robotics eXperience，机器人体验），该部门将直接向公司首席执行官汇报，成为三星未来增长战略的重要组成部分。

据了解，RX事业部将负责制定机器人领域中长期发展规划，推动机器人核心技术研发和产品业务落地，同时加强韩国及海外研发体系建设，提升机器人技术商业化能力。

此次组织调整表明三星正在进一步加大在机器人领域的投入，推动相关业务从研发阶段转向规模化应用阶段。 作为消费电子和智能硬件领域的全球领导者，三星旨在通过机器人技术拓展新的增长空间，增强在人工智能、智能家居、未来服务机器人等领域的竞争力。

近年来，随着人工智能、大模型、智能制造技术的快速发展，机器人产业成为科技企业竞争的新方向。 三星、英伟达、谷歌、特斯拉等企业正在加速机器人技术布局，推动AI能力与物理设备深度融合。

三星成立独立机器人业务部门，表明该公司正在调整组织架构，整合研发资源，加速机器人产品商业化。 未来，RX事业部能否推出具有市场竞争力的机器人产品，将是观察三星AI和智能硬件战略实施情况的重要指标。
